# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

class SendgridMailer < ApplicationMailer
  require "net/http"
  require "json"

  DEFAULT_SENDGRID_API_BASE = "https://api.sendgrid.com/v3".freeze

  class DeliveryError < StandardError
    attr_reader :status, :body, :request_id

    def initialize(message = "SendGrid delivery failed", status: nil, body: nil, request_id: nil)
      super(message)
      @status = status
      @body = body
      @request_id = request_id
    end
  end

  def send_email(to:, subject:, content:, from: nil, cc: nil, bcc: nil, reply_to: nil, attachments: nil, categories: nil, custom_args: nil)
    from_email = (from || default_from_email).to_s
    to_list = normalize_emails(to)
    cc_list = normalize_emails(cc)
    bcc_list = normalize_emails(bcc)

    payload = {
      personalizations: [
        {
          to: to_list.map { |e| { email: e } }
        }.tap do |p|
          p[:cc] = cc_list.map { |e| { email: e } } if cc_list.any?
          p[:bcc] = bcc_list.map { |e| { email: e } } if bcc_list.any?
          p[:custom_args] = stringify_hash(custom_args) if custom_args.present?
        end
      ],
      from: { email: from_email },
      subject: subject.to_s,
      content: normalize_content(content)
    }.tap do |h|
      h[:reply_to] = { email: reply_to.to_s } if reply_to.present?
      h[:categories] = Array(categories).map(&:to_s) if categories.present?
      h[:attachments] = normalize_attachments(attachments) if attachments.present?
    end

    deliver_via_sendgrid!(payload)
  end

  private

  def deliver_via_sendgrid!(payload)
    api_key = sendgrid_api_key
    raise DeliveryError, "Missing SendGrid API key" if api_key.blank?

    uri = URI.join(sendgrid_api_base, "/mail/send")
    http = Net::HTTP.new(uri.host, uri.port)
    http.use_ssl = uri.scheme == "https"
    http.open_timeout = 10
    http.read_timeout = 30

    request = Net::HTTP::Post.new(uri.request_uri)
    request["Authorization"] = "Bearer #{api_key}"
    request["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
    request["User-Agent"] = "Rails SendgridMailer"
    request.body = JSON.generate(payload)

    response = http.request(request)

    return true if response.code.to_i.between?(200, 299)

    request_id = response["X-Message-Id"] || response["X-Request-Id"]
    raise DeliveryError.new(
      "SendGrid delivery failed (HTTP #{response.code})",
      status: response.code.to_i,
      body: response.body,
      request_id: request_id
    )
  end

  def normalize_content(content)
    if content.is_a?(Array)
      content.map { |c| normalize_single_content(c) }
    else
      [normalize_single_content(content)]
    end
  end

  def normalize_single_content(content)
    if content.is_a?(Hash)
      type = (content[:type] || content["type"] || "text/plain").to_s
      value = (content[:value] || content["value"] || "").to_s
      { type: type, value: value }
    else
      { type: "text/plain", value: content.to_s }
    end
  end

  def normalize_attachments(attachments)
    Array(attachments).map do |att|
      if att.is_a?(Hash)
        {
          content: att[:content] || att["content"],
          filename: att[:filename] || att["filename"],
          type: att[:type] || att["type"],
          disposition: att[:disposition] || att["disposition"] || "attachment",
          content_id: att[:content_id] || att["content_id"]
        }.compact
      else
        att
      end
    end
  end

  def normalize_emails(value)
    Array(value).flatten.compact.map(&:to_s).reject(&:blank?).uniq
  end

  def stringify_hash(hash)
    return {} if hash.blank?
    hash.to_h.transform_keys(&:to_s).transform_values { |v| v.nil? ? "" : v.to_s }
  end

  def sendgrid_api_base
    ENV.fetch("SENDGRID_API_BASE", DEFAULT_SENDGRID_API_BASE)
  end

  def sendgrid_api_key
    ENV["SENDGRID_API_KEY"] || Rails.application.credentials.dig(:sendgrid, :api_key)
  end

  def default_from_email
    ENV["DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL"] ||
      Rails.application.credentials.dig(:mail, :from) ||
      Rails.application.config.action_mailer.default_options&.dig(:from) ||
      "no-reply@example.com"
  end
end
